gauge.name: Little Patuxent River at Allview

impacts.statement: Carlinda Avenue begins to flood at its lowest point.
Water approaches a residence in the Columbia area.
Backyards and trails along the Little Patuxent River are flooded.
Water exceeds the banks of the Little Patuxent River.

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
